csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: Name attribute is used for object identification within FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_us: Name attribute is used for object identification within FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_gb: Name attribute is used for object identification within FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_fr: L'attribut Nom permet l'identification de l'objet dans FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_de: Das Namensattribut wird für die Objekt-ID in FlexPLM verwendet.
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_es: El atributo Nombre se emplea para identificar los objetos dentro de FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ja: 名前属性は FlexPLM 内でオブジェクトの識別に使用します
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_it: L'attributo Nome consente l'identificazione di oggetti in FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ko: Name attribute is used for object identification within FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ru: Name attribute is used for object identification within FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_cn: 名称属性用于 FlexPLM 中的对象识别
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_tw: Name attribute is used for object identification within FlexPLM
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_pt_br: Name attribute is used for object identification within FlexPLM

csvPropertyValue.csvvalue: Do not enable this attribute as it's only used for search result views.
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_us: Do not enable this attribute as it's only used for search result views.
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_en_gb: Do not enable this attribute as it's only used for search result views.
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_fr: N'activez pas cet attribut car il est seulement utilisé pour l'affichage des résultats de la recherche.
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_de: Aktivieren Sie dieses Attribut nicht, da es nur für Suchergebnis-Ansichten verwendet wird.
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_es: Este atributo no debe activarse. Solamente se utiliza en las vistas de resultados de búsquedas.
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ja: この属性はサーチ結果ビューでのみ使用されているため有効にしないでください。
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_it: Non attivare l'attributo in quanto utilizzato solo per le viste dei risultati di ricerca.
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ko: Do not enable this attribute as it's only used for search result views.
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_ru: Do not enable this attribute as it's only used for search result views.
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_cn: 请勿启用此属性，因其仅用于搜索结果视图。
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_zh_tw: Do not enable this attribute as it's only used for search result views.
csvPropertyValue.csvlocale_pt_br: Do not enable this attribute as it's only used for search result views.
